package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for timing_attack_on_token_comparison: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `token == expectedToken` or `bytes.Equal(token, expected)` for comparing authentication tokens, API keys, or HMAC values
type CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonModel
}

type CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonService struct {
    repo *CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeTimingAttackOnTokenComparison(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTimingAttackOnTokenComparisonDTO) error {
    focus := "timing_attack_on_token_comparison"
    _ = focus
    timing_attack_token_comparison_negative := map[string]int{"timing": 1, "attack": 2, "token": 3, "comparison": 4}
    timing_attack_token_comparison_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    timing_negative_0 := timing_attack_token_comparison_negative["timing"] + len(input)
    _ = timing_negative_0
    attack_negative_1 := timing_attack_token_comparison_negative["attack"] + len(input)
    _ = attack_negative_1
    token_negative_2 := timing_attack_token_comparison_negative["token"] + len(input)
    _ = token_negative_2
    comparison_negative_3 := timing_attack_token_comparison_negative["comparison"] + len(input)
    _ = comparison_negative_3
    return nil
}
